title: MATANA 40 Premium Hard Plastic Plates with Hammered Gold Rim - 20 x 26cm, 20 x 19cm - Reusable Gold Party Plates for Weddings, Birthdays, Christmas, Parties
features: ELEGANT DESIGN: Our clear plastic plates with hammered gold rim are designed to add an elegant touch to any event. The gold edge adds a touch of luxury and sophistication, making them ideal for formal occasions. The design is elegant and stylish, allowing them to complement a variety of table settings.

TWO SIZES: The set includes two different sizes, 20 x 26cm dinner plates and 20 x 19cm side plates, making them ideal for serving different dishes. The larger plates are perfect for serving main courses, while the smaller ones are suitable for appetizers, salads or desserts. This makes them versatile for different types of events and dishes.

PERFECT FOR ANY OCCASION : Whether it's a wedding, birthday, christening, BBQ, Christmas celebration, picnic, garden party, family gathering, or corporate event, these gold plates are designed to suit any occasion. Their timeless design complements a wide range of themes and settings.

STURDY AND REUSABLE : Our party plates are made from strong, reusable materials, making them both durable and environmentally friendly. Unlike traditional paper or plastic plates, these hard plastic plates can be used multiple times, making them a more sustainable option.

CARE INSTRUCTIONS: To ensure longevity, the reusable plastic plates should be hand washed only and should not be used in the microwave or dishwasher. Although they are durable, they require a little extra care to maintain their elegant appearance.
description: Product Description Elegance Redefined Indulge in sophistication with our Gold Plastic Tableware, ideal for main courses, starters, desserts, and appetizers. Each piece brings an elegant touch to your dining experience. Premium Quality Immerse yourself in quality and durability. Our shatterproof design ensures a premium feel, perfect for all occasions—weddings, birthdays, formal events, or a simple outdoor BBQ or picnic. Versatile Glamour Unleashed From weddings to casual gatherings, our tableware adds glamour effortlessly. Suitable for indoor and outdoor use, it's the ideal choice for christenings, Christmas, birthdays, and more. Celebrate in style, anytime, anywhere. Wash and Reuse Our gold tableware are reusable, making them a sustainable choice. After your event, cleaning them is a breeze – simply wash them with mild soap and warm water, and they're ready for your next gathering. Previous page Wedding Make your wedding venue a masterpiece with Matana's stunning tableware collection. Picnic Brighten up your picnic spread with our range of tableware. Party Matana Plates and Bowls bring style, functionality, and elegance to your dining table.
